boss.name: Core Sentinel Prime
boss.victory_condition: Integrate the Master Override Key into the central console while surviving environmental onslaught.

encounters.trigger: Destruction of the drone forces the bulkhead door to the security hub to retract.
Defeating the bot triggers an emergency lockdown sequence, forcing the player to the reactor corridor.

pickup.effect: Grants complete access to the core containment systems
pickup.name: Master Override Key

encounters.trigger: Applying the key to the final console forces the Core Sentinel Prime to engage the player.

output.objective: Stabilize the failing Aegis-7 reactor core before total collapse.

boss.name: Time-Locked Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronal Key to force the Sentinel into a loop of rapid aging until it disintegrates.

encounters.hazard: Corroded catwalks that collapse under pressure
encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone triggers the emergency blast doors to the engine core to open.
Defeating the spider releases the magnetic lock on the mainframe, granting access to the bridge.

pickup.effect: Allows manipulation of local time flow, slowing nearby projectiles
pickup.name: Chronal Key

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the bridge console, exposing the final chamber of the Overlord.

output.objective: Escape the abandoned space station before the singularity collapses the structure.
